hero.desc: Report issues around you — broken roads, garbage piles, malfunctioning public facilities — directly to the relevant agencies. Transparent, fast, and measurable.

how.title: How LaporGas Works
how.subtitle: Your complaint is processed transparently and measurably
how.step1Desc: Submit your complaint or aspiration clearly and completely
how.step2Desc: Within 3 days, your report is verified and forwarded to the relevant agency
how.step3Desc: Within 5 days, the agency will follow up and respond to your report
how.step4Desc: You can respond to the agency's reply within 10 days
how.step5Desc: Your report will continue to be followed up until fully resolved

footer.about: An official public complaint platform to create better public services throughout Indonesia.
footer.helpBanner: Need further assistance? Consult your issue with us.
